samples.target_compile_errors:
error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/conversions/lvalue_array_fun_c3/sample_001/target.rs:5:14
  |
5 | fn main() -> i32 {
  |              ^^^ `main` can only return types that implement `Termination`
  |
  = help: consider using `()`, or a `Result`

error[E0277]: the trait bound `usize: From<&str>` is not satisfied
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/conversions/lvalue_array_fun_c3/sample_001/target.rs:2:53
  |
2 |     std::any::type_name::<T>().to_string().as_str().into()
  |                                                     ^^^^ the trait `From<&str>` is not implemented for `usize`
  |
  = help: the following other types implement trait `From<T>`:
            `usize` implements `From<bool>`
            `usize` implements `From<std::ptr::Alignment>`
            `usize` implements `From<u16>`
            `usize` implements `From<u8>`
  = note: required for `&str` to implement `Into<usize>`
help: consider removing this method call, as the receiver has type `String` and `String: From<&str>` trivially holds
  |
2 -     std::any::type_name::<T>().to_string().as_str().into()
2 +     std::any::type_name::<T>().to_string().into()
  |

error: aborting due to 2 previous errors
